hero.headline: Press, releases, and what we're publishing.
hero.subhead: Vergent is a delivery-first firm - we write when we have something to say, not on a content calendar. This page is the home for press releases, product announcements, and the occasional field note from an engagement we can talk about.

status.title: We're standing this up.
status.body: Our newsroom is being rebuilt as part of the wider site redesign in 2026. Past press is being migrated from the previous WordPress site; new releases will publish here first. If you need historical coverage in the meantime, the team is happy to send it on request.

categories.title: Press releases
categories.summary: Company announcements - new offices, partnerships, leadership additions, and material engagements where the client is happy to be named.

categories.title: Product announcements
categories.summary: V/ergent, CyberCore, BankCore, and OCDP release notes. Major feature launches, framework coverage updates, and platform availability.

categories.title: Field notes
categories.summary: Short write-ups from real engagements - anonymised where required. The kind of thing we'd send a colleague over coffee, not gated whitepapers.

press.title: Working on a story?
press.body: We can usually turn around quotes, technical background, or executive availability inside one business day. Have a deadline - say so when you write.

subscribe.title: Nothing to subscribe to yet.
subscribe.body: When we have a mailing list worth subscribing to, it will live here. For now, LinkedIn is the most reliable signal - we post when something ships.
